purpose: Curated slim shortlist for octoparse-lead-generation. Use this file before widening to the full Octoparse lead-generation catalog.
selection_rules: Prefer this shortlist over the full category page.
Keep recommendations narrow and default to the primary template for each track.
Treat review templates as enrichment, not discovery.
Do not treat product or generic review templates as lead-generation defaults.
For Google Maps, default to template 1577 for discovery and 941 only when reviews are explicitly needed.
Whenever an upstream template can provide a website URL, prefer Contact Details Scraper as the default enrichment template.
For b2b-company-leads, prefer Google Search Scraper when contact details are not required, and prefer Google Search Email Finder (Premium) when contact details are required.

typical_chains.workflow: Google Maps Scraper -> Contact Details Scraper
typical_chains.use_when: The user wants local business leads plus enriched contact details such as email, phone, or social links
typical_chains.field_mapping: Website/Page_URL-derived website -> Contact Details Scraper Website URL
typical_chains.notes: Prefer this over Google Maps family variants when the core need is discovery plus contact enrichment.

typical_chains.workflow: Google Maps Scraper -> Google Maps Reviews Scraper
typical_chains.use_when: The user explicitly wants review text or review-based local business enrichment
typical_chains.field_mapping: Google Maps place details URL/Page_URL -> Google Maps Reviews Scraper input
typical_chains.notes: Reviews are enrichment, not the first discovery step.

typical_chains.use_when: The upstream directory result exposes website URLs and the user wants richer contact details
typical_chains.field_mapping: Website -> Contact Details Scraper Website URL
typical_chains.notes: Use the same pattern for other regional directory templates that produce website URLs.

typical_chains.use_when: The user wants a direct email-focused Google Search workflow instead of a separate website enrichment step
typical_chains.field_mapping: No upstream template required; this template uses the search query directly
typical_chains.notes: Do not present this as a default output-to-input chain from Google Search Scraper. It shares search-style inputs but is better treated as a standalone email-focused option.

typical_chains.use_when: The user wants B2B company discovery from a company directory, especially for agencies, service providers, or company listing research
typical_chains.field_mapping: No upstream template required; this template starts from Clutch listing page URLs
typical_chains.notes: Use this as a directory-style B2B discovery option, not as a contact-enrichment template.

typical_chains.workflow: Gelbe Seiten Listing Scraper (Cloud by keyword pairs) -> Gelbe Seiten Details Scraper (Cloud by URLs)
typical_chains.use_when: The user wants German directory discovery first, then richer business detail enrichment
typical_chains.field_mapping: listing/detail URLs -> Gelbe Seiten Details Scraper input
typical_chains.notes: A regional directory workflow for Germany.

typical_chains.use_when: The user wants German directory listing discovery followed by detail enrichment
typical_chains.notes: Useful for German lead data such as telephone, email, rating, and opening hours.

typical_chains.use_when: The user wants association email discovery from a directory source
typical_chains.field_mapping: No upstream template required; starts from HelloAsso URLs

typical_chains.use_when: The user wants social profile discovery rather than standard contact extraction
typical_chains.field_mapping: No upstream template required; starts from a name or nickname

templates.name: Contact Details Scraper
recommended_when: The upstream template can provide website URLs
The user wants email, phone, or contact enrichment from business websites
A default post-discovery enrichment step is needed

templates.name: Google Maps Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants local business leads from Google Maps
The user needs business names, phones, websites, addresses, ratings, or page URLs
The user wants a default Google Maps lead template without exploring many variants
The user may later enrich website-based contacts with Contact Details Scraper

templates.name: Google Maps Reviews Scraper
recommended_when: The user explicitly wants review text or review-based enrichment
A Google Maps place details URL is already available or can be obtained first
key_inputs: Google Maps Place Details Page URLs (up to 10,000)

templates.name: Superpages Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants US local-business leads from a directory source instead of Google Maps
The user wants a stable English directory-based local-business template
The user may later enrich discovered websites with Contact Details Scraper

templates.name: Yellow Pages Scraper (Cloud)
recommended_when: The user wants directory-based local-business leads in an English/global workflow
The user is comfortable with company plus zip-code style inputs
The user may later enrich website-based contacts
key_inputs: Company;zip code (with no space between but a semicolon)

templates.name: Gelbe Seiten Details Scraper (Cloud by URLs)
recommended_when: The user needs German local-business leads from a stable directory source
The user already has listing URLs and wants detail enrichment

templates.name: Clutch Scraper (Company Listing)
recommended_when: The user wants B2B company discovery from Clutch
The user is researching agencies, service providers, or company directories
The user needs company-listing level discovery rather than direct contact enrichment

templates.name: Google Search Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants broad B2B company discovery from Google Search
The user needs company pages, result URLs, or search-discovered targets
The user wants the default search-based company-lead template
The user does not need contact details such as email or phone in the first recommendation

templates.name: Google Search Email Finder (Premium)
recommended_when: The user wants Google Search based email-focused B2B lead discovery
The user cares more about finding email-bearing pages than broad result discovery
The user does not need a strict upstream-to-downstream template chain and can start from the search query directly
The user explicitly needs contact details such as email or phone

templates.name: Google Maps Email Finder
recommended_when: The user wants Google Maps local-business leads with direct contact-detail emphasis
The user wants emails, phones, websites, and social links from a Google Maps driven workflow

templates.name: Google Maps advanced Scraper for Japan
recommended_when: The user wants Japan-focused Google Maps business discovery
The user needs a richer Google Maps workflow for Japan

templates.name: Gelbe Seiten Listing Scraper (Cloud by keyword pairs)
recommended_when: The user wants German local-business lead discovery from Gelbe Seiten
The user wants keyword-pair based directory discovery before detail enrichment

templates.name: Itown Page Listing scraper
recommended_when: The user wants Japanese local-business discovery from iTown
The user can provide the site-specific area and keyword format required by iTown

templates.name: Itown page details_cloud only
recommended_when: The user already has iTown detail URLs and wants richer Japanese local-business details

templates.name: Pagesjaunes Business Info Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants French local-business lead discovery from PagesJaunes

templates.name: 11880.com Listing Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants German lead discovery from 11880.com

templates.name: 11880.com Detail Scraper
recommended_when: The user already has 11880.com detail URLs and wants richer German lead details

templates.name: Helloasso Association Emails Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants association or organization email discovery from HelloAsso
The user wants a directory-native email workflow rather than generic search discovery

templates.name: Social Media Finder
recommended_when: The user wants public social profile discovery from a name or nickname
The user wants social-profile style lead enrichment rather than website contact extraction
